_note: Machine-readable benchmark expectations for /report-review. Derived from Docs/ARCHIVE/PipelineV1/2026-04-16_Benchmark_Report_Quality_Status_Matrix.md, with 2026-05-09 Captain correction removing erroneous MIXED acceptability for true-side Bolsonaro and asylum-current-total families, and correcting bundesrat-simple from the older mixed/leaning band to a high-true literal-chronology band. Update this file after each significant rerun wave — it is the mechanical source for bands; Docs/AGENTS/Captain_Quality_Expectations.md is the living narrative/comparator source. Historical WIP docs are supporting context only. Fields null = no verified expectation yet.
_noiseNote: Run-to-run variance on truthPercentage for a given input is typically ≤8%. Differences within this band are noise, not regression.

families.inputValue: Der Bundesrat unterschrieb den EU-Vertrag rechtskräftig bevor Volk und Parlament darüber entschieden haben
families.qualityStatusNote: Stage 1 contract/anchor failure fixed. Current isolated rerun f8e72c84fb004f23945e23c81973fc26 on 2026-05-10 succeeded as LEANING-FALSE 32/80 with 3 AtomicClaims, 5 boundaries, 88 evidence items, and no user-visible warnings; Captain accepted it as good. Truth 32 is 3 points below the nominal band minimum but inside the 8-point noise tolerance. Semantic polish on the rechtskräftig anchor may still vary across runs.
families._failed_rerun_2026-04-16: Rerun 4177998a at HEAD 35a22fba returned UNVERIFIED 50/0 with 0 evidence items, 0 boundaries, 12 LLM calls. Root cause: Stage 2 evidence extraction timed out (467 Fix3 LLM timeouts logged that day; 5 jobs submitted concurrently). NOT treated as a regression — needs isolated single-job rerun to confirm qualityStatus.
knownOpenIssues: semantic precision on rechtskräftig anchor — claim shape still slightly variable
latest accepted rerun sits just below the nominal truth band but within repository noise tolerance

families.inputValue: Der Bundesrat unterschrieb den EU-Vertrag bevor Volk und Parlament darüber entschieden haben
families.qualityStatusNote: Captain correction on 2026-05-09: simple wording is a literal chronology claim. High-true reports are preferred when they state that signature before parliamentary/popular approval happened while caveating that signature is not final democratic approval. Current exact canary 1de78d0a5a2c428baba3f40d189e46a7 on 2026-05-12 at bce6365f confirmed the corrected band as TRUE 97/93 with 2 AtomicClaims, 5 boundaries, 65 evidence items, and 41 sources. It matches the preferred exact local comparators a6b0e0fc14984926a678a462456bc110 and a53573047fe64778a76e53cb578900c7 on verdict shape, but it hit a user-visible research budget warning and took about 23.7 minutes wall-clock; treat report quality as confirmed and runtime as watch debt.
knownOpenIssues: latest current-head canary hit a user-visible budget_exceeded warning after the research time budget, so runtime/research breadth remains an operational watch item even though verdict quality passed
do not spend another immediate bundesrat-simple job just to repeat the high-true verdict; next work is timing/performance diagnosis if release readiness requires no user-visible budget warnings

families.inputValue: Mehr als 235 000 Personen aus dem Asylbereich sind zurzeit in der Schweiz
families.qualityStatusNote: Must be true-side. Captain correction on 2026-05-09 removed prior MIXED allowance; caveats about source retrieval, freshness, threshold closeness, or incomplete current component tables belong in confidence/reasoning, not a neutral or false-side verdict direction. Captain accepted current exact canary bb2133a191894da9bacf4f63e4b458ac as very good: MOSTLY-TRUE 78/68, one claim, 4 boundaries, 38 evidence items, and the decisive SEM 2025 aggregate 235 057 as direct support. Truth 78 is 3 pts above nominal band max 75 but within the existing 8-point noise tolerance; keep watch because of prior false-side stability variance.
families._note_rerun_2026-04-16: Rerun e5becebe at HEAD 35a22fba returned MOSTLY-TRUE 78/68. Truth 78 is 3 pts above band max 75 — within 8-pt noise tolerance. Band held; no adjustment needed. Higher confidence (68) is a positive signal.
knownOpenIssues: three post-fix current passes now exist, including Captain-accepted bb2133a191894da9bacf4f63e4b458ac, but the latest is just above the nominal truth-band edge and the family still has prior false-side stability history

admin-only evidence_pool_imbalance snapshot warnings must reconcile with final meta.evidenceBalance after applicability; stale contradiction-skew diagnostics are reporting bugs, not report-quality evidence
residual narrative can still use component reconstruction as uncertainty context; it must not become decisive support or contradiction unless the source supplies a complete non-overlapping aggregate
MIXED is not acceptable for this family; close-threshold caveats belong in confidence/reasoning, not verdict direction

prior current-stack stability rerun 511c2b17299a49a5a9640505c40eac0f fetched current XLSX/RU sheets but regressed false-side by stitching component tables into an agent-composed total instead of using one clean official SEM aggregate

families.inputValue: 235000 Flüchtlinge leben in der Schweiz, das sind fast so viel im am Ende des Zweiten Weltkrieges.
families.qualityStatusNote: First exact current-stack pair on 2026-05-10 established a false-side band: 9e1f0f0014564edeaa0e673b43dc27e6 returned MOSTLY-FALSE 25/73 and ce265797d3fc4540a45aaeac99510e4a returned LEANING-FALSE 30/63. Reports should distinguish the current SEM/asylum-area 235k component, which may be true-side or definition-caveated, from the historical comparison. The dominant historical claim is endpoint stock at the end of WWII, not cumulative wartime admissions/flows; using cumulative flows as support is a regression.
knownOpenIssues: first band is based on two exact same-stack runs; keep watch until Captain accepts or a later spot-check confirms stability
AC_01 current 235k subclaim can vary by definition between SEM asylum-area aggregate and narrower refugee counts, but AC_02 historical endpoint comparison should dominate the article verdict
reports must treat 'am Ende des Zweiten Weltkrieges' as endpoint stock, not cumulative wartime admissions or flows
some reports can cite current-count evidence as support for the historical comparison bucket; citation/directness cleanliness remains a review item
weak local report 808e6f8ac29a4850b10ff04c9c534d85 is excluded as a comparator because it appears to use cumulative WWII admissions as support for an endpoint-stock comparison

families.inputValue: Did the legal proceedings against Jair Bolsonaro comply with Brazilian law, and did the proceedings and the verdicts meet international standards for a fair trial?
families.qualityStatusNote: Must be true-side with caveats. Captain correction on 2026-05-09 removed prior MIXED allowance; original Bolsonaro expectation records legal basis as strongly supported and procedural fairness as largely supported with legitimate concerns. Captain accepted current exact canary aedb3a05046441aba3eb2f6047ca0e22 on 2026-05-12 as OK. It recovered true-side shape after Stage-4 direction-summary and repair-band fixes: overall LEANING-TRUE 64/43, AC_01 65/50, AC_02 62/32, AC_03 62/30, no user-visible warnings. Keep watch because overall confidence is 2pp below the canonical band and fair-trial/verdict claim confidence remains low; keep 91bf6083 / 85812d61 as stronger comparators.
families._note_rerun_2026-04-16: Rerun da3580fe (PT variant, not EN) confirmed LEANING-TRUE 58/61 at HEAD 35a22fba — see bolsonaro-pt entry for EN twin confirmation.
knownOpenIssues: Captain accepted latest current exact run aedb3a05046441aba3eb2f6047ca0e22 as OK/current usable on 2026-05-12, but this is one exact canary and not repeated stability closure
latest current exact run has no user-visible warnings and all three claims true-side; overall confidence is 2pp below the family band but Captain accepted it as OK
AC_02/AC_03 confidence remains low because unresolved impartiality/appellate-review caveats are treated as confidence limiters despite one-sided direct support
MIXED or false-side outcomes are regressions unless backed by strong target-specific evidence that overturns the original legal-basis/fairness expectation

families.inputValue: O processo judicial contra Jair Bolsonaro por tentativa de golpe de Estado respeitou o direito processual brasileiro e os requisitos constitucionais, e as sentencas proferidas foram justas
families.qualityStatusNote: Must be true-side with caveats. Captain correction on 2026-05-09 removed prior MIXED allowance; original Bolsonaro expectation records legal basis as strongly supported and procedural fairness as largely supported with legitimate concerns. Direct rerun da3580fe at HEAD 35a22fba confirms LEANING-TRUE 58.2/61. Language-agnostic fixes transferred correctly from EN variant.
knownOpenIssues: MIXED or false-side outcomes are regressions unless backed by strong target-specific evidence that overturns the original legal-basis/fairness expectation
ACS must not drop the sentence-justice/verdict-fairness clause as mere opinion; reports with only two selected/final claims are structurally incomplete even when the top-line verdict is in band

families.inputValue: Using hydrogen for cars is more efficient than using electricity
families.qualityStatusNote: TTW/WTW conflation fixed. Report now correctly exposes distinct full-pathway and tank-to-wheel claims/boundaries. Cleanup territory — no active firefighting needed.

Band recalibrated 2026-05-31 from an evidence-grounded analysis of all 108 stored exact-input reports (see Docs/WIP/2026-05-31_Plastic_Pointless_AtomicClaim_Independent_Proposal.md). 'Pointless' is interpretation-laden: the literal reading ('achieves nothing') is trivially FALSE, while the reasonable/steelman reading ('does not meaningfully work / is not worth it') is MIXED-to-TRUE given a stagnant ~9% global recycling rate and pervasive downcycling. Fact-checking norm assesses the reasonable meaning, so the honest expectation is a CENTERED band, not either pinned extreme. The pipeline's stable 3-dimension decomposition (environmental MIXED ~49, economic MIXED ~50, effectiveness/rate LEANING-TRUE ~70) aggregates to MIXED/LEANING-TRUE; corpus central tendency is LEANING-TRUE+MIXED = 63% of 108 reports. LEANING-FALSE is tolerable only at the lower edge (literal reading). The real defect at both prior extremes was CALIBRATION (FALSE 9/78 and MOSTLY-TRUE 85/88 are both overconfident); hence the confidence ceiling 75 and the reading-declaration rule below.
families.verdictNarrativeRule: The verdict narrative must explicitly state which reading of 'pointless' it assesses (literal vs reasonable/effectiveness). Confidence must not exceed 75 on this interpretation-dependent claim. Generic principle for evaluative/interpretation-laden inputs — not a plastic-specific rule.
families._recalibrated_2026-05-31: Supersedes the Pipeline_V2 false-side band (FALSE/MOSTLY-FALSE/LEANING-FALSE/MIXED, 10-42, accepted 2026-05-11) AND main's earlier true-side band (MIXED/LEANING-TRUE/MOSTLY-TRUE, 40-75, 2026-05-26). Independent, evidence-derived, centered. The 2026-05 false-side reports reflect a deliberate hardening toward the literal reading — evidence of interpretation-dependence, not a ground truth.
families._superseded_v2_note: Stage 4 advocate parse-failure fixed and the 2026-05-10 operational stale-watchdog failure is repaired by runner heartbeat commit 37554ace. Prior accepted exact job 939563ecbea14a4c90249eb13c9743ef (LEANING-FALSE 37/62) and historical comparator 32f00bb32d644a909f0c99521e800536 (MOSTLY-FALSE 21/68) remain real reports but sit at/below the lower edge of the recalibrated centered band.
families._failed_rerun_2026-04-16: Rerun 89c8f2ec at HEAD 35a22fba returned UNVERIFIED 50/0 with 0 evidence items, 0 boundaries, 12 LLM calls, plus 4 preliminary_fetch source_fetch_failure (info). Root cause same as Bundesrat: Stage 2 LLM timeout under concurrent load. NOT confirmed as a Stage 4 parse regression — needs isolated rerun.
knownOpenIssues: interpretation-dependent: verdict direction hinges on literal vs reasonable reading of 'pointless' — wide centered band is intentional, not a defect
calibration risk: reports tend to overconfidence at both extremes; confidence ceiling 75 enforced
verdict narrative must declare which reading it assesses
evidence aggregation variance across runs
plastic remains a control lane, not a reliable family for asserting total report-quality stability
